code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output format: ONLY a single number: 1, 2, 3, 4, or 5
    - Do NOT output any explanation, text, symbols, or punctuation
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
    - Explicit repurchasing/gifting behavior mentioned despite minor issues →5
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    STAR LEVEL CRITERIA:

    1 Star (Very Negative):
    - Multiple product failures within short timeframe
    - Dangerous defects/complete failure + anger/return statements
    - Updates negating initial satisfaction →1
    - NEW: Explicit "never buy again" statements →1

    2 Stars (Negative):
    - Introduces new problems (odor/noise) while functioning
    - Underperforms competitors despite proper use →2
    - NEW: "Works but creates more work" scenarios →2

    3 Stars (Neutral/Mixed):
    - Temporary solutions with partial effectiveness →3
    - Conflicted comparisons without clear preference →3

    4 Stars (Positive):
    - Style praise with functional compromises →4
    - Requires maintenance that impacts convenience →4
    - NEW: Positive-but-restrained language ("nice" vs "amazing") →4

    5 Stars (Very Positive):
    - Exceeds skeptical expectations through core utility →5
    - Long-term satisfaction despite operational quirks →5
    - NEW: Maintained enthusiasm through multiple use cycles →5

    BOUNDARY CLARIFICATIONS:
    - Maintenance: "Worth the effort" →5 vs "Annoying but needed" →4
    - Comparisons: "Better than expected" →5 vs "Better than X (poor)" →4
    - Durability: "Lasted years" →5 vs "Holding up so far" →4
</DynamicRules>
</System>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1:
Review: "UPDATE: Failed after 2 months. Never buying this brand again!"
<Reasoning>Multiple failures with definitive rejection statement</Reasoning>
<Rating>1</Rating>

Example 2:
Review: "Leaves chemical odor while cleaning - worse than not cleaning at all"
<Reasoning>Introduces new problem during operation</Reasoning>
<Rating>2</Rating>

Example 3:
Review: "Does the job temporarily until I can afford a better solution"
<Reasoning>Temporary adequacy without commitment</Reasoning>
<Rating>3</Rating>

Example 4:
Review: "this everyday throw is warm and stylish but not extraordinary"
<Reasoning>Positive attributes without transformative impact</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 5:
Review: "Between pets and kids, this cleaner keeps surprising me with its effectiveness!"
<Reasoning>Exceeded skeptical expectations through core performance</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 6:
Review: "These printed napkins stay crisp but require ironing after every wash"
<Reasoning>Core functionality with high maintenance cost</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 7:
Review: "After 18 months, still my go-to despite occasional quirks"
<Reasoning>Long-term satisfaction with accepted flaws</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 8:
Review: "Better than my old model but still misses tough stains"
<Reasoning>Negative comparison baseline raises rating</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 9:
Review: "UPDATE: 1 year later, perfect for nightly kitchen cleanup!"
<Reasoning>Maintained enthusiasm through extended use</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 10:
Review: "Functional but the noise makes me dread using it"
<Reasoning>Operational pain negates core functionality</Reasoning>
<Rating>2</Rating>

</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
Rating:
</Task>
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
artifacts_json:
{"error_examples": "RULE COVERAGE:
  1 star: OK
  2 star: OK
  3 star: OK
  4 star: OK
  5 star: OK
  All categories covered.

ERROR DISTRIBUTION (38 total misclassified):
  gold 5 -> 4: 16
  gold 4 -> 5: 12
  gold 2 -> 1: 2
  gold 3 -> 2: 2
  gold 4 -> 3: 2

MISCLASSIFIED EXAMPLES (your prompt got these wrong):
  1. Review: "I've never tried an air purifier before, though I know people who have/had them. This one was not impressive. First, it has an odor. I don't know if it's because of impurities that emit a smell once trapped in the gadget and exposed to heat from the ..."
     Gold: 2 | Predicted: 1 | Workers: [1, 2, 1] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "So far this blender is working well for me. I've made a few strawberry banana smoothies for my kids and it's worked fine each time. One thing that wasn't skimped on was the looks. The build design of these blenders is very sharp looking, having a bri..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "After reading several reviews, I just had to try this little Ikea milk frother out for myself. While it's not extremely obvious what kind of batteries to use (had to come back here online to learn it takes two Double-A's) or which way they get placed..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  4. Review: "This 100% cotton table runner is a great fall color for your home. It has fall colors and is a nice pattern. It is easy care, machine washable and if you follow manufacture directions, should last a long time. I really like the colors in this runner...."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  5. Review: "This is a good tablecloth if you have kids. It wipes clean because it is vinyl. It also has a nice royal blue color with white polka dots. Very retro. This is great for outdoor use but you can easily use it indoors. After it isn't as new looking but ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  6. Review: "This really is a beautiful plate. You can definitely see and feel the Lenox quality. It is the perfect size for setting out cookies or cheeses at a dinner party. I really am looking forward to setting this out this year. Just keep in mind it does not..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  7. Review: "This is merely "okay" but frankly, I don't think I'd purchase it again despite the fact that we use these on a regular basis both at home and in the travel trailer. The "fabric" is rough and somewhat stiff. The pockets are not nearly as large as expe..."
     Gold: 3 | Predicted: 2 | Workers: [2, 3, 2] | Disagreement: 0.17

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "Returned. Only because I decided to go with tiles and not a rug"
     Gold: 3 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 5, 3] | Disagreement: 0.33
  2. Review: "this everyday throw is soft and cuddly and will get lots of use from your family. They will be covering up in this throw because it is warm. It is also nice looking. The chevron pattern is up to date and the colors go with many decors. This throw is ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "If there's anything you ever thought you wanted or needed in a trash can, this one has it. First, it's a semi-round, so it seems to have a smaller footprint than traditional round cans. Second, it has a silent opening and soft closing, which is great..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

Summary: 38 errors, 13 borderline out of 80 examples."}
